headline: CooperVision Launches MADE BETTER™ Promise Beginning with MyDay® Contact Lenses*¹
summary: CooperVision announced today the launch of its MADE BETTER™ Promise—a new global sustainability platform focused on smarter, more sustainable choices.*†1 Built on years of CooperVision innovation in sustainability, MADE BETTER™ Promise is woven throughout the life of participating products, beginning with the MyDay® daily disposable family of contact lenses.*†1

content.title: CooperVision Launches MADE BETTER™ Promise Beginning with MyDay® Contact Lenses*¹
content.summary: CooperVision announced today the launch of its MADE BETTER™ Promise—a new global sustainability platform focused on smarter, more sustainable choices.*†1 Built on years of CooperVision innovation in sustainability, MADE BETTER™ Promise is woven throughout the life of participating products, beginning with the MyDay® daily disposable family of contact lenses.*†1

thumbnail.caption: CooperVision, a division of CooperCompanies (Nasdaq: COO), is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of contact lenses. The company produces a full array of daily disposable, two-week, and monthly soft contact lenses that feature advanced materials and optics, and premium rigid gas permeable lenses for orthokeratology and scleral designs. For more information, visit coopervision.com. (PRNewsfoto/CooperVision, Inc.)
